title: Physaliastrum macrodon
taxonomy: Physaliastrum macrodon is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to New South Wales in Australia. The plant belongs to the tribe Gnaphalieae and is closely related to other species within the same tribe. Physaliastrum macrodon is further classified within the genus Physaliastrum, which is characterized by its distinctive flowers and growth habits. This species is often found growing in dry, sandy soils and rocky outcrops in its native habitat.
